title: erucastrum palustre
intro: Erucastrum palustre, also known as watercress bitters or blistering watercress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant's leaves and stems are used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Erucastrum palustre include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Erucastrum palustre can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
